## Overview

The RLE Environment Monitoring solution from RLE Technologies provides comprehensive, real-time environmental monitoring for data centers, server rooms, and critical infrastructure facilities. The system delivers accurate, actionable data directly to building and network management systems without requiring cloud subscriptions or new software stacks.

## Key Features

### Real-Time Monitoring Capabilities
- Temperature monitoring
- Humidity tracking
- Airflow velocity measurement
- Differential air pressure monitoring
- CO₂ level detection
- Water leak detection
- Smoke detection
- Motion and door security monitoring

### Technology Advantages
- **Fast Response Rate**: Reports up to every 10 seconds while maintaining long battery life
- **Scalable Architecture**: Centralized management of hundreds of sensing points from a single controller
- **Native Integration**: Direct BACnet/IP, MS/TP, Modbus TCP/RTU, and SNMP v1/v2c/v3 support without gateways
- **Plug-and-Play**: Sensors automatically register on power-up with built-in web UI
- **Extended Range**: Up to 600 ft range (expandable to 1,000 ft with WiNG-RXT)
- **Long Battery Life**: Up to 12 years on multi-year batteries
- **On-Premises Security**: HTTPS/TLS encryption, role-based access control, local data logging
- **No Recurring Fees**: Predictable ownership costs with included firmware upgrades

## System Components

### Controller Options

#### WiNG-MGR v2
Wireless management controller with rapid deployment and flexible placement
- Manages up to 250 WiNG family sensors
- Auto-discovery capability
- BACnet/IP, MS/TP, Modbus TCP/RTU, SNMP v1/v2c/v3 protocols
- Local logging (~30 days per point)
- Role-based web interface
- 1U compact design

#### FMS (Facility Monitoring System)
Full-scale, high-density monitoring for complex sites
- 8 configurable analog/digital inputs
- Expandable with additional cards (up to 32 inputs)
- Interactive floor-plan maps
- PUE/DCiE metrics calculation
- Multi-unit aggregation support

#### F200
Compact, cost-effective solution for targeted monitoring
- 4 plug-and-play digital sensors via RJ-11 1-Wire
- One zone of leak detection
- Ideal for small server rooms and network closets
- Compact wall-mount form factor

#### BMS-1WIRE
Secure temperature and humidity monitoring wired directly into BMS
- Integrates up to 8 1-Wire sensors
- BACnet MS/TP and Modbus RTU support
- Panel-friendly compact design
- No local alarm logging (passes data to BMS)

### Deployment Options

#### Wireless System (WiNG Series)
- Battery-powered sensors with up to 12 years battery life
- 600 ft transmission range (expandable to 1,000 ft)
- Supports 250 sensors per unit (expandable to 400)
- No cabling, conduit, or drilling required
- Mount sensors in seconds

#### Wi-Fi System
- Leverages existing facility wireless infrastructure
- No dedicated wireless gateways required
- Connects directly to enterprise Wi-Fi network
- Reduces deployment time and infrastructure costs

#### Wired System
- FMS, F200, and BMS-1WIRE controllers
- Ideal for high-security applications requiring closed-loop systems
- Supports dozens of wired sensors
- Dense I/O and legacy integration capabilities

## Applications

The RLE Environment Monitoring solution is trusted across:
- Leading hyperscalers
- Global AI infrastructure facilities
- Cloud platform partner data centers
- Federal emergency networks

## Specifications Summary

### Environmental Monitoring Parameters
- Temperature: Accurate monitoring across facility zones
- Humidity: Relative humidity tracking with dew point calculation
- Air Flow: Velocity and differential pressure measurement
- Gas Detection: CO₂ monitoring and smoke detection
- Water Detection: Leak detection with zone monitoring
- Security: Motion and door/contact sensors

### Protocol Support
- BACnet/IP and MS/TP
- Modbus TCP and RTU
- SNMP v1, v2c, and v3
- Native integration without protocol gateways

### Reliability & Support
- 40+ years of industry experience
- Deployments running strong for over a decade
- Local firmware upgrades included
- Multi-protocol support included at no extra cost
- On-premises operation with complete data control
